text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's why I told you to add sugar and milk.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Awww, but you never add that stuff, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I wanna drink coffee just like you do!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, I have to admit, today's coffee 
is especially astringent.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I'll add a little sugar myself.
